Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=d.get\('scripts',{}\); t=d.get\('devDependencies',{}\); print\('scripts:', list\(s.keys\(\)\)\); print\('test deps:', [k for k in t if 'jest'in k or 'vitest'in k or 'playwright'in k]\)")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); const s=p.scripts||{}; const d={...p.devDependencies,...p.dependencies}; console.log\('scripts:', Object.keys\(s\).filter\(k=>k.includes\('test'\)\)\); console.log\('test-related:', Object.keys\(d\).filter\(k=>/jest|vitest|playwright/.test\(k\)\)\)")

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\Users\\joker\\Documents\\GitHub\\1\\public\\spomove\\dive\\models\\dive_track_segment.glb"\); $jsonLen = [System.BitConverter]::ToUInt32\($bytes, 12\); $json = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes, 20, $jsonLen\); $obj = $json | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "---meshes---"; $obj.meshes | ForEach-Object { $_.name }; Write-Host "---nodes---"; $obj.nodes | ForEach-Object { $_.name })

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\Users\\joker\\Documents\\GitHub\\1\\public\\spomove\\dive\\models\\dive_obstacle_crate_a.glb"\); $jsonLen = [System.BitConverter]::ToUInt32\($bytes, 12\); $json = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes, 20, $jsonLen\); $obj = $json | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "---meshes---"; $obj.meshes | ForEach-Object { $_.name }; Write-Host "---nodes---"; $obj.nodes | ForEach-Object { $_.name }; Write-Host "---accessors-bounds---"; $obj.accessors | Where-Object { $_.max -ne $null } | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { "max: $\($_.max -join ','\)  min: $\($_.min -join ','\)" })

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\Users\\joker\\Documents\\GitHub\\1\\public\\spomove\\dive\\models\\dive_duck_spaceship.glb"\); $jsonLen = [System.BitConverter]::ToUInt32\($bytes, 12\); $json = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes, 20, $jsonLen\); $obj = $json | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "---meshes---"; $obj.meshes | ForEach-Object { $_.name }; Write-Host "---nodes---"; $obj.nodes | ForEach-Object { $_.name })
